title: Great Britain Wins Tennis Match to Reach Finals
summary: Great Britain's tennis team won an important match against Australia to go to the Billie Jean King Cup finals. Harriet Dart and Jodie Burrage played doubles together for the first time and won in straight sets. This gave Great Britain a 3-0 lead, so they could not lose the tie. Earlier, Mika Stojsavljevic and Harriet Dart won their singles matches. The team captain, Anne Keothavong, is very happy and thinks they can win the title. Great Britain did this without some of their best players, showing they are strong. The finals will be in Shenzhen in September.

background_read: The Billie Jean King Cup is a big tennis tournament for women's national teams. Teams play matches to qualify for the finals. Great Britain has been doing well recently and wants to win the title. This article talks about how they beat Australia to reach the finals in September.
Article_Structure: WHO: Harriet Dart, Jodie Burrage, and the Great Britain tennis team
WHAT: Won a doubles match to send Great Britain to the Billie Jean King Cup finals
WHY: To qualify for the finals and try to win the title

perspectives.description: The win shows how players worked together to succeed.
